remaining_tasks.name: Research Phase 4
remaining_tasks.progress: Researcher agent spawned, running in background

decisions.decision: Jaeger v2 as raw K8s manifests via Pulumi (not Helm chart)
decisions.rationale: Jaeger v2 unified binary config not supported by v1 Helm chart
Industry standard, includes ServiceMonitor CRDs, matches OBS-03

decisions.decision: Grafana dashboard via ConfigMap sidecar provisioning
decisions.rationale: Standard kube-prometheus-stack pattern, keeps dashboard JSON maintainable

decisions.decision: All UIs ClusterIP-only, Ingress deferred to Phase 5
decisions.rationale: Keeps Phase 4 focused on components, Phase 5 owns Ingress

next_action: Check if researcher agent completed and wrote 04-RESEARCH.md. If yes, continue plan-phase workflow from step 5.5 (validation strategy). If no, re-spawn researcher.
context_notes: Running /gsd-plan-phase 4 --ws gks-refactor. CONTEXT.md was captured in prior discussion session. Researcher agent was spawned in background (gsd-phase-researcher, sonnet model). Workflow is at step 5 (research). After research completes: create VALIDATION.md, spawn planner (opus), then plan-checker (sonnet). Security threat model required (ASVS L1, block on high).
